note: Official base: driver must BOTH stop+stay AND turn on hazards+set warning sign. Our opt1 (stop/stay) and opt2 (hazards+sign) are both required, so correct = opt3 'Виконати всі перелічені дії'. Confirmed by manualov/testpdr q1662, pomahach, green-way 6528 (all give 'Відповіді 2 і 3' / 'do all listed'). Stored answer 2 is wrong; should be 3.
